title: Bouncy Castle!
description: Multicolored blocks that you can bounce off the sides of!
body:
Adds multicolored blocks that you can bounce off all 6 sides of! Hold jump to bounce further, sneak to dampen the bounce (may cause fall damage if falling from high up). ![Created for ModFest: Singularity](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1008539448016916717/1011047045735395448/ModFest_Singularity_Banner.png) Requires Quilt and the Quilted Fabric API. Concept and main code by Sunroses (Jakie)
Textures and improved code by [Aury System](https://modrinth.com/user/aurysystem) <3
